perturbation.original_text: That any ideas, patentable or not patentable, or suggestions co ntributed by you during the discussion, as well as any ideas , developments, or inventions c onceived by you or others participating in the Focus Group, shall be the property of the company sponsoring this research study in an y manner it sees fit.
perturbation.changed_text: That any ideas, patentable or not patentable, or suggestions co ntributed by you during the discussion, as well as any ideas , developments, or inventions c onceived by you or others participating in the Focus Group, shall be the property of the company sponsoring this research study in an y manner it sees fit, except for ideas that the participant registers for copyright within 30 days of the focus group.
perturbation.explanation: Adding the exception that ideas the participant registers for copyright within 30 days are not the property of the company creates a direct contradiction. The original text states ALL ideas become property of the company, but the addition carves out an exception. This change contradicts the first sentence of paragraph b.
perturbation.contradicted_text: b) That any ideas, patentable or not patentable, or suggestions co ntributed by you during the discussion, as well as any ideas , developments, or inventions c onceived by you or others participating in the Focus Group, shall be the property of the company sponsoring this research study in an y manner it sees fit.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that all ideas conceived during the focus group shall be the property of the sponsoring company. The changed text adds an exception for ideas registered for copyright within 30 days, which directly contradicts the original claim that all ideas become the company's property. This contradicts paragraph b as it originally stated that any ideas shall be the property of the company sponsoring this research study in any manner it sees fit, but the modified text carves out an exception.

perturbation.original_text: The products shown to you, described to you, and/or used by you are not available for sale and no offer for sale is being made to you.
perturbation.changed_text: The products shown to you, described to you, and/or used by you are not available for sale and no offer for sale is being made to you, unless the company representative explicitly states otherwise during the focus group session.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'unless the company representative explicitly states otherwise during the focus group session,' we directly contradict the original statement that no offer for sale is being made. This contradicts the statement that it's not available for sale in paragraph c.
perturbation.contradicted_text: c) The products shown to you, described to you, and/or used by you are not available for sale and no offer for sale is being made to you.
perturbation.justification: The original text states 'no offer for sale is being made to you', which is reiterated in the contradicted text. The changed text adds an exception: 'unless the company representative explicitly states otherwise during the focus group session'. This directly contradicts the original statement and the contradicted text, creating a clear conflict regarding whether a sale can be offered. Therefore, the structural flaw introduces a strong in-text contradiction as it exists in multiple locations with conflicting implications.

perturbation.original_text: All notes, reference materials, m emoranda, documentation and re cords in any way incorporating or reflecting any of the Confidential Information shall belong exclusively to Owner and the undersig ned agrees to turn ove r all copies of suc h materials in the undersigned’s possession t o Owner upon request.
perturbation.changed_text: All notes, reference materials, m emoranda, documentation and re cords in any way incorporating or reflecting any of the Confidential Information shall belong exclusively to Owner, except personal notes taken by participants for their own records, and the undersig ned agrees to turn ove r all copies of suc h materials in the undersigned’s possession t o Owner upon request.
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'except personal notes taken by participants for their own records' creates a contradiction. The original text mandates that ALL notes belong to the owner, while the change makes an exception for personal notes. This contradicts the first part of paragraph e.
perturbation.contradicted_text: e) All notes, reference materials, m emoranda, documentation and re cords in any way incorporating or reflecting any of the Confidential Information shall belong exclusively to Owner and the undersig ned agrees to turn ove r all copies of suc h materials in the undersigned’s possession t o Owner upon request.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that ALL notes belong to the owner. The changed text introduces an exception, stating that personal notes taken by participants for their own records do not belong to the owner. This directly contradicts the original statement in the original and contradicted text that 'All notes...shall belong exclusively to Owner'. Therefore, the change creates a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: That you acknowledge yo u are being sufficiently compensated for your participation in this Focus Group and that all informat ion and opinions you provide a re solely your own and are in no way reflective of your employer(s).
perturbation.changed_text: That you acknowledge yo u are being sufficiently compensated for your participation in this Focus Group and that all informat ion and opinions you provide a re solely your own unless otherwise explicitly stated, and may or may not be reflective of your employer(s).
perturbation.explanation: The addition of 'unless otherwise explicitly stated, and may or may not be reflective of your employer(s)' introduces a contradiction. The original text states all opinions are solely the participant's and not reflective of their employer. This addition allows for exceptions, creating uncertainty. This contradicts paragraph g.
perturbation.contradicted_text: g) That you acknowledge yo u are being sufficiently compensated for your participation in this Focus Group and that all informat ion and opinions you provide a re solely your own and are in no way reflective of your employer(s).
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds 'unless otherwise explicitly stated, and may or may not be reflective of your employer(s)', which directly contradicts the original and contradicted text stating 'all information and opinions you provide a re solely your own and are in no way reflective of your employer(s)'. This creates an exception where previously there was none, creating a direct conflict as opinions are now allowed to be reflective of the participant's employer, leading to an in-text contradiction.
